message:
✨ i18n: Extract remaining hardcoded strings across 83 components (#1021)

* ✨ i18n: Extract first batch + add 918 new locale keys

- Extract 70 common strings (JSX text, placeholders, titles, aria-labels)
- Add 643 new keys to cards.json (github, kubectl, clusterGroups, etc.)
- Add 275 new keys to common.json (actions, resource labels, statuses)
- Activate 12 deferred hooks (_t → t)
- Add 7 new useTranslation hooks
- Fix namespace conflicts with multi-namespace useTranslation arrays
- Fix sub-component scope issues for t() calls

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ i18n: Extract strings from GitHubActivity, Kubectl, ClusterGroups, NightlyE2E, RSSFeed, Security

- Extract ~200 user-facing strings from 7 major component files
- Add rssFeed, github, kubectl, clusterGroups, nightlyE2E, security keys to cards.json
- Fix cross-namespace key references with common: prefix
- Activate deferred hooks in all modified files

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ i18n: extract strings from 12 more components

Extract hardcoded strings from batch 3 components:
- ClusterComparison, NamespaceQuotas, HardwareHealthCard
- EPPRouting, LLMdFlow, KVCacheMonitor, PDDisaggregation
- Deploy, Nodes, Operators, DemoInstallGuide, LLMdBenchmarks

Fix QuotaModal sub-component namespace prefixes for cross-namespace
key access (common:common.* and common:selectors.*).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🌱 i18n: extract strings from batch 4 (11 high-impact components)

Extract hardcoded strings from ClusterCosts, ConsoleOfflineDetectionCard,
ClusterDetailModal, ClusterGrid, PodDrillDown, FeatureRequestModal,
MissionChat, CanIChecker, CloudProviderIcon, WidgetExportModal,
and AlertRuleEditor into i18n locale files.

Add ~280 new translation keys across common.json and cards.json.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🌱 i18n: extract strings from batch 5 (23 components + locale updates)

Extract hardcoded English strings from GPU, drilldown, deploy, clusters,
gitops, missions, cards, sidebar, and agent components. Add 500+ new
locale keys across cards.json and common.json covering GPUReservations,
ParetoFrontier, StockMarketTicker, CardChat, LLMdAIInsights, Checkers,
ClusterHealth, SecurityIssues, UserManagement, SidebarCustomizer,
Clusters, RemediationConsole, GitOps, SaveResolutionDialog,
DeployConfirmDialog, DriftDrillDown, OperatorDrillDown,
HelmReleaseDrillDown, MissionSidebar, AgentStatusIndicator,
and APIKeySettings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
